title: NEXUSUniversalOSEvent
description: Top-level event envelope for all NEXUS Universal OS system events. Every event emitted by a NEXUS module MUST conform to this schema.

event_id.description: UUID4 unique identifier for this event instance.

source_module.description: Name of the NEXUS module emitting the event (e.g., 'affectengine', 'schumann').

node_id.description: Optional GAIA node identifier (EID, hostname, or UUID). Identifies which GAIA node emitted this event.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of event emission (e.g., '2026-07-22T21:00:00Z').

trace_id.description: Optional distributed trace ID for OpenTelemetry / cross-module correlation.

correlation_id.description: Optional ID linking this event to a preceding event or request.

severity.description: Event severity level, aligned with HealthSeverity in EmrysEngine.

tags.description: Optional free-form tags for routing, filtering, and indexing.

payload.description: Module-specific event payload. Structure varies by event_type. Must be a valid JSON object.

provenance_hash.description: Optional SHA-256 hash linking this event to its provenance record in SovereignMemory.
